THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SURNCEY, STEVEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 POWELL STREET #701, SAN FRANCISCO $127.75 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $127.75, STAYED UNTIL APR-28-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, THE $ 127.75 RENT IS DUE BY 03:00PM ON MARCH 27, 1998.

PRO TEMP ARNOLD EVJE, K.LEE/CLERK, NO CSR 03:00PM CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THOMAS WRIGHT FOR THE PLTF. THE DEFT, STEVEN SURNCEY, IS PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE IS SETTLED OUTSIDE THE PRESENCE OF THE CLERK AND THE REPORTER. PRO TEMP REPRESENTS THAT THE CASE SHOULD GO OFF CALENDAR/SETTLED AND THAT THE PLTF WILL FILE THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT.
